component.name: deskOTP
component.summary: Desktop OTP authenticator with multi-app backup import

description.p: deskOTP is a desktop authenticator that displays rotating TOTP and HOTP codes. Click any code to copy it to the clipboard, ready to paste. Import your accounts from 16 authenticator apps including Aegis, 2FAS, Google Authenticator, Ente Auth, and more.
Features include group organization, issuer icon matching with 800+ brand logos, search, and adjustable display density.
